meta-description: Learn about member survey results by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Member survey results
excerpt: A survey conducted by the Consumer Assessment of Healthcare Providers and Systems (CAHPS) which asks health plan members to rate the care their experiences with their health plan and its services.
content: A survey conducted by the Consumer Assessment of Healthcare Providers and Systems (CAHPS) which asks health plan members to rate the care their experiences with their health plan and its services.
